requirements.req: Countdown resets when a reminder is edited
requirements.expected: Timer restarts from the full interval after saving an edit
requirements.evidence: Countdown read 22:14:03 before the edit and 22:13:41 after — no reset.

requirements.req: Resend button disabled while a countdown is active
requirements.note: No disabled state or handler exists anywhere in the reminder row; ticket acceptance criterion #4.

requirements.req: Reminder email actually sends when the countdown expires
requirements.note: Expiry is hours away and the dev environment has no outbound mail; a follow-up run can check the message history.

requirements.req: Editing one reminder does not affect other reminders' countdowns
requirements.evidence: Reminder #1 countdown unchanged (18:02:11 → 18:01:47, normal decay) across the R1 edit.

ambiguities: Ticket doesn't say what happens to an in-flight countdown when the reminder's interval is shortened below time already elapsed — reset, fire immediately, or clamp?
untested_env_gaps: Outbound email delivery (no SMTP in dev).
